latest.title: How to Replace Your LLM-Based Safety Agent with Amazon Bedrock Guardrails
latest.description: A practical guide to implementing content filters, jailbreak detection, PII redaction, and denied topics — with code, cost analysis, and real test results from a customer-facing chatbot.

latest.title: Configurando uma base de conhecimentos no Amazon Bedrock utilizando o Aurora PostgreSQL e Terraform
latest.description: Configuração de uma base de conhecimento no Amazon Bedrock integrada ao Aurora PostgreSQL, utilizando Terraform para provisionamento automatizado, escalável e seguro da infraestrutura na AWS.

latest.title: What AWS Transform custom Found in My 'Clean' Code
latest.description: I ran AWS Transform custom's codebase analysis on a serverless pipeline I was about to push to GitHub. It generated 31 documentation files, found issues I'd missed, and gave me the exact code to fix them.

latest.title: 5 coisas que você precisa saber antes de começar em Cloud Computing com a AWS
latest.description: Aqui estão as 5 coisas essenciais que você deve aprender antes de se aventurar no mundo da AWS! Eu sei que pode parecer complicado logo de início, mas, lendo este artigo, você verá que a jornada é muito mais intuitiva do que imagina.

latest.title: Você não precisa de certificação para começar na AWS (mas precisa disso aqui)
latest.description: Quer começar na AWS, mas não sabe por onde? Este artigo mostra um caminho mais leve e acessível, sem a pressão de certificações logo no início, o que é ideal para quem está dando os primeiros passos, mesmo fora da área de tecnologia.

latest.title: Como ser Universitário Protagonista dentro da sua Universidade: da timidez à Líder Estudantil aws Builder 2026.
latest.description: Destaco como e por onde você que é jovem pode assumir o protagonismo dentro da sua Universidade.

latest.title: O início da minha jornada no programa builder da AWS: Elevando o desenvolvimento de jogos para a nuvem
latest.description: Como a paixão por games e liderança de comunidades me levou a mergulhar no ecossistema de nuvem da AWS. Um relato sobre sair da zona de conforto, organizar workshops e conectar desenvolvedores.

latest.title: Build a RAG Bot with Amazon Bedrock in 30 Minutes
latest.description: No ML expertise needed. Connect S3 docs to Claude 3 via Bedrock Knowledge Bases and get cited answers in 30 minutes. Code and diagram included.

latest.title: Want to Learn AWS? Start Your Cloud Journey the Right Way
latest.description: A beginner-friendly guide to getting started with AWS, including core services, hands-on projects, and the best resources to build real cloud skills.

latest.title: Como Empreender com AWS: a jornada real de quem começou do zero
latest.description: Do primeiro erro de configuração ao primeiro produto no ar o que ninguém te conta sobre construir uma solução na nuvem quando você está começando.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: NeuroVoice
trending.description: Small moments, repeated daily, reveal what single snapshots never can - patterns that quietly signal neurological risk. NeuroVoice is a multimodal Parkinson’s screening platform that tracks pattern over time to detect subtle neurological changes early.

trending.title: AWS Summit London Attendee Exclusive: Builder Question of the Day
trending.description: If you're attending the AWS Summit in London, come say hi at the Developer Community Zone in the Expo and get involved in our Builder Question of the Day challenge!

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: ASET – Academic Safety and Evidencing Truth
trending.description: ASET (Academic Safety and Evidencing Truth) is an AI-powered claim verification platform built on AWS that verifies scientific claims against 1.2M+ peer-reviewed papers across 8 domains — and automatically fetches and permanently stores new papers from arXiv, PubMed, etc. when gaps are found, making the knowledge base self-growing with every query. From typed claims to YouTube videos and uploaded documents, ASET delivers evidence-backed trust scores in under 10 seconds.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Global Impact AI Navigator
trending.description: Global Impact AI Navigator (GIAN) is a multi-agent AI platform built on Amazon Bedrock that transforms a raw idea into a complete strategic package in under 60 seconds — SWOT diagnostic, live-grounded funding discovery, personalized roadmap, and a context-aware advisor. Designed for innovators in emerging markets, it democratizes access to the strategic guidance that usually requires expensive consultants or elite networks.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Perspective
trending.description: Perspective is an AI-powered mental health companion that extracts clinical insight from free-form speech — no mood scales required. Using 4-cluster parallel extraction on Amazon Bedrock, validated against the Subjective Units of Distress Scale (SUDS), Work and Social Adjustment Scale (WSAS), PHQ-9, and GAD-7, it serves undiagnosed users and diagnosed patients alike. Clinician-validated by three practising doctors. Built on AWS serverless with Kiro.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Veloquity - The Agentic Evidence Intelligent Platform Turning Raw Feedback into Evidence-Driven Decisions
trending.description: Decisions don’t fail from too little data - they fail from too much noise. Veloquity, an agentic evidence intelligence platform, filters that noise by transforming fragmented feedback into validated evidence and delivering explainable, prioritized recommendations with full source-to-decision traceability that guides human decisions. READ ON TO SEE HOW.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: RetainIQ
trending.description: Detect knowledge concentration risk before it costs you. RetainIQ scores every critical topic 0–100 and triggers AI interventions. Zero docs effort required.

trending.title: Your Cloud Journey Starts Here—With AWS
trending.description:
🚀 Ready to start your cloud journey?
Explore how Amazon Web Services can help you build real-world skills, work on projects, and unlock new opportunities.
Start small, stay consistent, and grow with the cloud ☁️

#students #https://builder.aws.com/start?trk=7cff29b7-5b80-4b00-adf1-e79ab5ac6509&sc_channel=el

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Ivy - The World's First Offline-Capable, Proactive AI Tutoring Agent
trending.description: A proactive AI tutoring agent powered by Amazon Bedrock that monitors student progress, initiates outbound voice calls, and runs on-device inference for offline learning addressing educational inequity for millions of Ethiopian students with intermittent connectivity.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Aether Health
trending.description: Discover how our AI-powered platform reimagines the last mile of healthcare by focusing on empathetic symptom checking and prescription decoding. We provide verified, calming tools to combat health anxiety and prevent dangerous medication errors for vulnerable populations.
